positive: A minimalist, abstract watercolor and ink illustration depicting a sleeping celestial fox (kitsune) curled up on a cloud, surrounded by floating geometric mandalas and crescent moons. The fox should have an elegant, ethereal silhouette, primarily rendered in soft pastels (lavender, pale aqua, rose gold) against a deep midnight indigo background. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for optimal apparel printing. Use a highly contrasting style, emphasizing negative space, fine linework, and subtle metallic shimmer effects. Studio quality, vector illustration aesthetic, clean edges, intricate details.
negative: bad anatomy, blurry, amateur, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, cropped, messy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, photorealistic, logos, trademarks, copyrighted
